name: Urstadt Biddle Properties Inc. 6.250% Series H Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Urstadt Biddle Properties Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on owning and operating community shopping centers in the United States, and UBP^H represents a series of their cumulative redeemable preferred stock. This preferred stock offers a fixed dividend payment and has a preference over common stock in the event of liquidation. Urstadt Biddle Properties is headquartered in Greenwich, Connecticut.
